description: Unit: MSP sign-in page passes remembered email into the shared login form when the durable cookie is present.
Unit: MSP sign-in page passes no initial email when the durable cookie is absent.
Unit: MSP login form initializes the email field from `initialEmail`.
Unit: MSP login form renders the `Public workstation - do not remember my email` checkbox.
Unit: the public-workstation checkbox defaults to unchecked.
API: the credentials remember-email endpoint stores the normalized lowercase email when public-workstation is false.
API: the credentials remember-email endpoint clears the durable cookie when public-workstation is true.
Unit: failed credentials sign-in does not call the remember-email persistence endpoint.
API: whitespace-padded mixed-case emails are persisted as trimmed lowercase values.
API: the durable remembered-email cookie is written with a 180-day max age.
Contract: the remembered-email implementation does not reuse the existing `msp_sso_last_provider` localStorage key or session cookie names.
Server/unit: the durable remembered-email cookie is read server-side for page prefill rather than from browser storage in the form component.
API: the MSP SSO resolve route accepts remember-context fields for normalized email and public-workstation state.
API: the MSP SSO resolve route writes a short-lived pending remember-context cookie for valid SSO starts.
API: the pending remember-context cookie is not written when the SSO resolve request is invalid or rejected.
Auth callback: successful OAuth login with public-workstation unchecked promotes the pending remember-context email into the durable cookie.
Auth callback: successful OAuth login with public-workstation checked clears any existing durable remembered-email cookie.
Auth callback: pending remember-context is cleared after successful OAuth finalization.
Auth callback: missing or invalid pending remember-context fails closed without blocking successful OAuth login.
Integration: an abandoned or failed OAuth flow does not create a durable remembered-email cookie.
Unit/UI: a prefilled remembered email still results in SSO discovery fetches for the MSP sign-in page.
Integration: a later successful MSP sign-in with a different email replaces the previously remembered email when public-workstation is unchecked.
Contract: client portal login components do not gain remembered-email or public-workstation behavior from this change.
Playwright: successful credentials sign-in remembers the email and prefills it on a later visit to `/auth/msp/signin`.
Playwright: successful credentials sign-in with public-workstation checked clears a previously remembered email and later visits show an empty email field.
Playwright: failed credentials sign-in leaves previously remembered email unchanged.
Playwright: successful SSO sign-in remembers the email and prefills it on a later visit.
Playwright: successful SSO sign-in with public-workstation checked clears previously remembered email.
Playwright: failed or cancelled SSO does not create a durable remembered-email cookie.
